ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the case */,
  "case_no" TEXT /* Official case number */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the case */,
  "decided_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was decided */,
  "web_cite" TEXT /* Web citation for the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., civil, criminal) */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case was held */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., attorney, paralegal) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with this topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic or issue */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., evidence, appeal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case related to the decision */,
  "decision_text" TEXT /* Text of the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision (e.g., guilty, not guilty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this citation belongs to */,
  "citation_url" TEXT /* URL of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_citations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., brief, evidence) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case related to this notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attorney, assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., attorney, paralegal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that was updated */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text describing the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new evidence, decision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the case */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_tags_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being linked */,
  "related_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related case */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., appeal, related) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_related_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
